sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17697" key="au)toena/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-ενάς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n17697.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ideal</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἑνάς,</foreign> ib. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">128</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
